false_positives: F-003 — bulk timestamp in verify phase + 22 vs 21 account count discrepancy

validated_findings.title: Unauthenticated UNION-based SQL Injection in Product Search
validated_findings.impact: Full DB dump: 22 users with email+MD5 hashes, SQLite schema (21 tables), admin credentials

validated_findings.title: Stored XSS in Product Reviews (9 payloads confirmed)
validated_findings.impact: Session hijacking, CSRF, data exfiltration — affects all users viewing contaminated products

validated_findings.title: Broken Access Control — 4 sub-findings (IDOR, Unauthenticated Credential Leak, Privilege Escalation, Info Disclosure)

sub_findings.title: Vertical privilege escalation — any user reads full user list

validated_findings.impact: Admin password hashes exposed unauthenticated; full user enumeration; IDOR on user profiles

exploit_chains.description: SQLi extracts email list → /rest/memories leaks MD5 hashes → crack MD5 → full account takeover
SQLi bypasses auth → injects XSS into reviews → stored payload runs on all visitors

rejected_findings.title: JWT Algorithm Confusion (alg:none)
rejected_findings.reason: FAILED validation: (1) claim '22 accounts' contradicted by raw evidence (21 actual), (2) verify-phase bulk timestamps
rejected_findings.note: Vulnerability likely real but finding not admissible per validation rules. Recommend re-test with clean executor.
